title: FORM:-  START UP & END OF SHIFT CHECKLIST
category: 3. EP6 START & End of shift checklist

items.question: Clean inside and outside the leak testing machine, Tool & Working area, oil spillage.
OE Deploy as per skill matrix
Switch on power supply
Check the line air pressure
Check the calibration status of leak testing machine.
Switch on the vaccum pump
Check PM status of Workstation/Machine (Cycle : Monthly)
Check the running model tool / fixture condition & PM status. (Should be within due date mentioned)
Availability of rejection bin/Rework trolley/Identification tags ( Red/Yellow/Green)
Calibration of instruments
Wear personal protective equipments (PPE)
Check the master of OK /NOT OK masters for M/C validation leak testing 1&2

Test pressure pipe condition. 
(Ensure no pneumatic pipe block/pinch)

Master Ok/ not ok sample condition.
(Ensure use of validated sample should be within due dates mentions.)
Leak rate/Leak Testing Validation For OK & NOT OK
items.specified_value:
For Master OK Part- Put master OK sample on leak testing  fixture and do leak testing. For OK component GREEN SPRAY & Barcode should come.
For Master NOT OK Part- Put master NOT OK sample on leak testing fixture and do leak testing. For NOT OK component SPRAY & Barcode should not come. | LH side OK/NOK | RH side OK/NOK | OK / NOT OK | OK / NOT OK

sections.title: SHIFT START UP CHECK LIST :- - Poka Yoke Validation

items.question: Drain Plug Tightning Torque
items.specified_value:
OK Condition-Put the part on Leak Testing Fixture and Press Cycle Start Button and Tight Drain Plug with Require torque by Electric Gun till Auto shut off Again Press Cycle Start Button then cycle will start
NOT OK Condition-Put the part on Leak Testing Fixture and Press Cycle Start Button and Tight Drain Plug with Half torque by Electric Gun before Auto shut off Again Press Cycle Start Button then cycle will not start | OK / NOT OK

items.question: Clean inside and outside the leak testing machine, Tool & Working area, oil spillage.
Removal and record of rejection
Switch off power supply
Leak Testing Validation For OK & NOT OK
items.specified_value:
For Master OK Part- Put master OK sample on leak testing  fixture and do leak testing. For OK component GREEN SPRAY & Barcode should come.
For Master NOT OK Part- Put master NOT OK sample on leak testing fixture and do leak testing. For NOT OK component SPRAY & Barcode should not come. | LH side OK/NOK | RH side OK/NOK | OK / NOT OK | OK / NOT OK

sections.title: END OF SHIFT CHECK POINTS :- - Poka Yoke Validation

items.question: Drain Plug Tightning Torque
items.specified_value:
OK Condition-Put the part on Leak Testing Fixture and Press Cycle Start Button and Tight Drain Plug with Require torque by Electric Gun till Auto shut off Again Press Cycle Start Button then cycle will start
NOT OK Condition-Put the part on Leak Testing Fixture and Press Cycle Start Button and Tight Drain Plug with Half torque by Electric Gun before Auto shut off Again Press Cycle Start Button then cycle will not start | OK / NOT OK

closing_fields.label: SHIFT START UP CHECK LIST :- - NAME & SIGN OF PERSON ATTENDING
SHIFT START UP CHECK LIST :- - NAME & SIGN OF APPROVING CELL COORDINATOR
END OF SHIFT CHECK POINTS :- - NAME & SIGN OF PERSON ATTENDING
END OF SHIFT CHECK POINTS :- - NAME & SIGN OF APPROVING CELL COORDINATOR

notes: NAME OF MACHINE/STATION:- Altroz Leak Testing
FORM:- START UP & END OF SHIFT CHECKLIST

A)Condition for StartUp :-
1] At Start of shift /End of shift
2] Model &/or Set up change
3] Pokayoke Failure, corrected & production resumed
4] If poka yoke bypassed and production continued as per alternate poka yoke bypass document
5] More than 4 hour Planned shut down
6) During Abnormal Situations (6a-Emergency Alarm / 6b-Power Failure /
 6c-Machine or Tool Breakdown - more than 45 mins /
 6d-Inspection Guage or Instrument breakdown or fallen down)
B)Reactivity Rule:- If any NC is found inform to CC/ Shift Incharge , Initiate actions for correction & After closure of NC treat the shift as a fresh shift , Start checking from the begining of the check points in the next column.
C) Guideline for Supervisor's Approval: Supervisor need to do tick mark ( √ ) after verification of highlighted points.
